perksWithImages.name: Enduring
perksWithImages.description: While not carrying a Survivor, Pallet-stuns are {Tunable.K03P01.StunDurationReduction%}% shorter.

perksWithImages.name: Dissolution
perksWithImages.description: {Tunable.K28P01.TimeBeforeTrigger}s after a Survivor takes damage, for {Tunable.K28P01.EffectDuration}s, the next time a Survivor fast-vaults a Pallet while within your Terror Radius, it is destroyed.

perksWithImages.name: Road Life
perksWithImages.description:
While injured, not {Keyword.Broken} and repairing a Generator:
  • Whenever you hit a basic great Skill Check, you earn {Tunable.S49P01.TokenPerSkillCheck} Token.
  • Whenever you miss a basic Skill Check, you lose {Tunable.S49P01.TokensLostOnSkillCheckFail} token.


When you have {Tunable.S49P01.MaxTokens} Tokens, spend all Tokens to heal {Tunable.S49P01.HealingSpeedIncrease%}% faster until you stop healing.

perksWithImages.name: Stake Out
perksWithImages.description:
After hiding for {Tunable.S12P03.TokenChargeTime}s within the Killer's Terror Radius, you earn {Tunable.S12P03.TokensGained} Token, up to {Tunable.S12P03.MaxTokens}.

Whenever you hit a good basic Skill Check, spend {Tunable.S12P03.TokensSpent} Token:
  • The good Skill Check becomes a great Skill Check.
  • You gain {Tunable.S12P03.BonusProgress%}% more progress.
